basic_details.job_title: Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Peon, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Peon, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi has released the official Peon, Office Assistant and More Posts Notification 2026 on 12-05-2026 at grihkalyankendra.gov.in. A total of various vacancies have been announced under the Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged up to 35–45 years depending on the post with qualifications ranging from 8th pass to Degree can apply offline from 12-05-2026 to 17-06-2026. The official notification PDF and offline application link are available below

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Varies by post, generally up to 35 or 45 years
age_limit.details: Accounts Assistant: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidate possessing higher qualification/Experience. Retired officers age should not be more than 62 years on the last date of receipt of application. Office Assistant: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidate possessing higher qualification/Experience. Retired officers age should not be more than 62 years on the last date of receipt of application. Nursery Teacher: Maximum Age: 45 Years. Day Care Teacher for Creche: Maximum Age: 45 Years. Relaxable up to 05 years in the case of candidates possessing higher qualification/experience. Nursery Attendants: Maximum Age: 45 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidates possessing higher qualification/experience. Day Care Attendants for Creche: Maximum Age: 45 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidates possessing higher qualification/experience. Caretakers: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 10 years for ex-servicemen on the last date of receipt of application. Craft Teachers: Maximum Age: 45 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidates possessing higher qualification/experience. Zonal Assistant: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidate. Booking Clerk: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 5 years in the case of candidate possessing higher qualification/Experience. Peon: Maximum Age: 35 Years. Relaxable up to 10 years for Ex-service men on the date of receipt of application.

qualification.details: Accounts Assistant: Degree of a Recognized university or equivalent. A pass in the SAS OR equivalent conducted by any of the Organized Accounts Department of the Central Government. OR Successful Completion of training in Cash and Accounts Work in ISTM. Possess three year experience of cash, accounts and Budget work. Desirable: Working Knowledge of Computers. Office Assistant: Degree of a Recognized University or equivalent. Experience of working in the Administration, Establishment and Accounts matters and Govt of India Rules and Regulations. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Operations. Nursery Teacher: Senior Secondary (10+2) with 50% marks. (i) JBT or Nursery Training Course after passing Senior Secondary from a recognized Institute. (ii) Competence to teach through Hindi and English medium. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Operations. Day Care Teacher for Creche: 12th passed. Preference will be given to candidates who have past experience in similar work. Nursery Attendants: 8th passed. Preference will be given to candidates who have past experience in similar work. Day Care Attendants for Creche: 8th passed. Preference will be given to candidates who have past experience in similar work. Caretakers: 10th pass or equivalent from a recognized Board / university. Desirable: Preference will be given to candidates possessing Higher qualifications /experience. Craft Teachers: A diploma after Hr. Secondary in Tailoring, Sewing, Needle work and Embroidery from any Institution recognized by State Govt./Govt. of India OR A degree/diploma after Higher Secondary in Home Science from an Institute recognized by the State Govt./Govt. of India. (iii) Working Knowledge of Hindi and English. Desirable: (i) Working Knowledge of Computer Operations (ii) One year practical experience in a recognized workshop/Institution/ factory Zonal Assistant: Degree of a Recognized University or equivalent. Administration, Establishment and Account matters and Govt. of India Rules and Regulations. Desirable: (iii) Working Knowledge of computer operation and accountancy. Booking Clerk: Senior Secondary (10+2) from a recognized Board / University. Desirable: (i) Should have command over spoken and written English (ii) Should have good communication skill and pleasing personality. (iii) Working knowledge of computer operations. Peon: 10th pass or equivalent from a recognized Board / university. Desirable: Preference will be given to candidates possessing Higher qualifications /experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: grihkalyankendra.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Staff Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Staff Recruitment is 17th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Staff posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. For some positions like Nursery Attendants and Day Care Attendants, an 8th pass is sufficient. For other roles, qualifications range up to a Degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Staff positions?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it with the required details, attach necessary documents, and send it to the Grih Kalyan Kendra (HQ), Samaj Sadan, Lodi Road Complex, New Delhi-110003.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Staff posts at Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi?
faq.answer: The honorarium for the Staff posts ranges from Rs. 7,000/- per month to Rs. 18,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any age relaxations for the Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available for certain categories. For example, up to 5 years for candidates with higher qualifications/experience, and up to 10 years for ex-servicemen in specific posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the Advertisement Number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Advertisement Number for this recruitment is 08/02/2023-GKK/1160.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contract-based positions at Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi?
faq.answer: The official website of Grih Kalyan Kendra Delhi is not provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to search for it online.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there a specific format for the envelope when sending the application?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are requested to super scribe the words "Application for the post of-------, GKK" on the envelopes before sending their applications.
